body_txt: Whether it is via the use of a Berserk Button or a Restraining Bolt , you know you can get a very precise reaction from a character if you do the right thing. Sometimes there's Animal Stereotype involved, but typically, it's according to the Rule of Funny or the Law of Disproportionate Response . See also the subtrope Reflexive Remark of Reverence , the trope Damn You, Muscle Memory! for a real-life version, You Just Told Me for a related phenomenon. See Never Say That Again for a vocal version, and Won't Take "Yes" for an Answer for another. Compare Freudian Slip . Overlaps with Don't Sneak Up on Me Like That! .
